Extensions.File:
# InDows - base "essentials" catalog. # # These are the few apps the base installs at first logon (via bootstrap.ps1). Keep it minimal; # add your own below. Find package ids with: winget search <name> or winget show <id> # # This file is a valid winget DSC document (you could also run it with # winget configure -f configuration.dsc.yaml --accept-configuration-agreements # ), but the InDows bootstrap simply reads the "id: <pkg>, source: winget" entries and installs them.
# yaml-language-server: $schema=https://aka.ms/configuration-dsc-schema/0.2 properties: configurationVersion: 0.2.0 resources: - resource: Microsoft.WinGet.DSC/WinGetPackage id: brave settings: { id: Brave.Brave, source: winget } # Brave - web browser - resource: Microsoft.WinGet.DSC/WinGetPackage id: sevenzip settings: { id: 7zip.7zip, source: winget } # 7-Zip - archiver
